name: FlexQube AB (publ)
summary: FlexQube AB (publ) provides flexible and robust industrial carts for material handling in Europe and North America. It offers carts, such as pallet and container, shelf, flow, hanging, mother-daughter, and kit carts and specialized solutions, as well as parts comprising standard building blocks, casters, fasteners/hardware, handle bars, tow bar components, attachments, shelves, tools, springs, pallet guides, rollers, and pallet changing system components. The company also provides eQart, a smart and motorized cart. Its customers include manufacturers of commercial vehicles, cars, civil engineering and industrial machinery, wind turbines and other energy related products, defense and medical equipment, and appliances and electronics; goods storage and distribution customers; and subcontractors to the automobile industry. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden.
